title: Like An Olive Tree

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Why do you boast of evil, mighty one?
God's love endures when day is done
Your tongue plots destruction like a blade
Cutting down the righteous in your raid

sections.label: Chorus
lines: But I am like an olive tree
Growing green in God's sanctuary
Forever and ever, I will praise
Your name through all my days

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: You love every word that brings decay
False over truth is what you say
But God will break you down at last
Your tent will crumble to the past

sections.label: Chorus
lines: But I am like an olive tree
Growing green in God's sanctuary
Forever and ever, I will praise
Your name through all my days
(Repeat)

sections.label: Bridge
lines: The righteous will see and fear
When pride comes tumbling down
Those who trusted wealth and power
Will wear destruction's crown

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: I trust in God's unfailing love
Like wings of mercy from above
The faithful gather, watching still
As justice claims its final bill

sections.label: Chorus
lines: But I am like an olive tree
Growing green in God's sanctuary
Forever and ever, I will praise
Your name through all my days

sections.label: Outro
lines: Forever and ever, I will praise
Your name through all my days

epigraph: But I am like a green olive tree in the house of God
